context: Location:   intrathoracic + subcutaneous √  deep seated growing mass between ribs √  mature fat tissue on CT + T1WI √  prominent internal septa > 2 mm in thickness √  nodular nonadipose areas (b)  vascular √  high SI on T2WI ← vascular tissue √  variable amounts of fat tissue on T1WI √  phleboliths on CT √  commonly in neck + axilla √  high SI greater than that of fat on T2WI
